title: HDM-Mod
description: A lightweight Forge mod inspired by His Dark Materials by Philip Pullman
body:
## HDM-mod

*A lightweight Forge mod inspired by* **His Dark Materials** *by Philip Pullman*

**HDM-mod** brings the world of *His Dark Materials* into Minecraft 1.16.5, starting with iconic items and concepts from the series. Designed for casual players and fans of the books, this mod aims to gradually expand into a deeper experience while remaining easy to drop into any modpack.

### 🌌 Current Features

* **Dust (Item)** – A mysterious material with potential…
* **Dust Block** – Decorative block made from Dust
* **Subtle Knife** – A powerful item that will allow you to slice open portals to other dimensions

### ⚙️ Details

* **Minecraft Version**: 1.16.5
* **Mod Loader**: Forge
* **Dependencies**: None
* **Performance**: Lightweight and modpack-friendly

### 🔮 Future Plans

* Select dimention to open window too.
* Lore-inspired items, creatures, and structures

---

### 💡 Try HDM-mod Today

Whether you're building your own multiverse or just want to collect some Dust, **HDM-mod** is the perfect addition to your casual modded Minecraft world. More features are on the way—stay tuned!
